meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Camoys was born in 1402, in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Camoys, was 20 and her mother, Joan Poynings, was 11399. She married Ralph Radmylde ,Baron Of Kingston about 1423. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1455, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Camoys est née en 1402, à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Camoys, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Poynings, avait 11399 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Radmylde ,Baron Of Kingston environ 1423. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1455, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Camoys 1402 in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Camoys 20 und ihre Mutter Joan Poynings 11399. Sie hat um 1423 Ralph Radmylde ,Baron Of Kingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1455 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Ralph Radmylde ,Baron Of Kingston circa 1423. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1455, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Camoys родилась в 1402 г. в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Camoys было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Poynings, 11399.
